basic_details.job_title: NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technology Warangal (NIT Warangal)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Warangal (NIT Warangal) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of NIT Warangal. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age Relaxation: 30 years for GEN; 33 years for OBC-NCL; 35 years for SC/ST/PwD/Female. As per norms and guidelines of the Institute.

qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Essential: Aggregate 60% marks or CGPA 6.5/10 for GEN/GEN-EWS/OBC-NCL (55% or 6.0/10 for SC/ST/PwD); B.E./B.Tech. in Metallurgical and Materials Engineering/Materials Engineering/Manufacturing Engineering/Chemical Engineering/Production Engineering/Mechanical Engineering or relevant; M.E./M.Tech. or equivalent in Metallurgical and Materials Engineering related specialisations; OR M.Sc. in Chemistry or Physics. GATE/NET not mandatory. Desired: Experience in battery technology, electrochemical testing, electrolyte formulation, materials characterization, lithium-ion batteries, fast charging, interphase chemistry, cell fabrication, data analysis; analytical ability, scientific writing.

selection_process: Shortlisting of eligible candidates Interview (offline mode preferred; online under special circumstances)
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Warangal JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow position at NIT Warangal is 15th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.E./B.Tech. in relevant engineering fields, or an M.E./M.Tech. in Metallurgical and Materials Engineering, or an M.Sc. in Chemistry or Physics with at least 60% marks (55% for reserved categories).

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General, OBC, SC, ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow post is 30 years. Age relaxations are applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 37,000/- to Rs. 42,000/-.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the NIT Warangal JRF position?
faq.answer: Applications must be sent via email to the address specified in the official notification before the deadline.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at NIT Warangal.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q9. Does NIT Warangal offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided for OBC-NCL (33 years), SC/ST/PwD/Female (35 years) as per institute norms.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' heading.
